global.description: The ad features a vibrant gradient background with abstract shapes and clear calls to action.
global.main_message: Promoting the MoonScreen app with a focus on trending content and a special offer.

elements.label: Ad background
elements.description: Full canvas background of the mobile advertisement.

elements.label: Background gradient
elements.description: A smooth gradient background transitioning from light purple to dark purple.

elements.label: Abstract shapes
elements.description: An abstract design featuring a large square and a circle, both outlined and centered in the middle of the ad.

elements.label: Additional graphic
elements.description: A smaller abstract shape, possibly a circle, positioned slightly off-center within the main graphic.

elements.label: Small graphic element
elements.description: A small circular graphic element located towards the bottom center of the ad.

elements.label: Call to action
elements.description: A prominent text area with bold white font stating 'Watch what's trending Start free today' at the bottom of the ad.
elements.text_content: Watch what's trending Start free today

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A clear text area displaying the price '€29.99' in a bold font, located just above the call to action.

elements.label: App logo
elements.description: The logo 'MoonScreen' displayed in a bold, modern font at the top of the ad.

embedding_texts.global_text: unknown, unknown, interstitial, modern minimalist with vibrant colors, MoonScreen app, trending content
embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by abstract shapes in the center, with the call to action and price at the bottom.
embedding_texts.ocr_text: MoonScreen, Watch what's trending, Start free today, €29.99, Book now
